channel.title: Data Analyst Blog
channel.description: Notes on data analysis, dashboards, and the tools behind them.

item.title: Choosing the Right Chart Type in Power BI: A Practical Guide
item.description: A quick decision guide for picking a chart type based on the question you're actually answering.

item.title: How to Automate a Weekly Excel Report with Power Query
item.description: Turn a repetitive weekly Excel report into a one-click refresh with Power Query.

item.title: DAX Basics: Understanding CALCULATE in Power BI
item.description: Why CALCULATE is the DAX function that finally makes filter context click.

item.title: 5 Excel Formulas Every Data Analyst Should Know (With Examples)
item.description: Five formulas that cover most day-to-day data cleaning and lookup work in Excel.

item.title: Power Query vs. Excel Formulas: When to Use Each for Data Cleaning
item.description: A practical rule of thumb for choosing between Power Query and formulas when your data is messy.

item.title: How to Build Your First Power BI Dashboard from an Excel File
item.description: A step-by-step walkthrough of turning a plain spreadsheet into your first working Power BI dashboard.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Why I'm starting this blog and what to expect from the posts ahead.
